title: Allow dynamic values in Monday Doc that are not in a board/table
excerpt: I would like to create a document and simply type {field name} to allow you bring in data from fields in a board/table. This is an option when the doc is within a board/table (see attachment) but not when I create a doc …

posts.author: mweekend (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create a document and simply type {field name} to allow you bring in data from fields in a board/table. This is an option when the doc is within a board/table (see attachment) but not when I create a doc on it’s own.
